ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF, 2 pages. All fields clearly legible.

criteria_met: Invoice number match: Certificate references 110423, 110424, 110425; invoice shows 110423, 110424, 110425.
Consignor match: Certificate consignor 'West Food i Göteborg AB' matches invoice exporter 'West Food i Göteborg AB'.
Consignee match: Certificate consignee 'Ikano (Thailand) Limited' matches invoice consignee 'Ikano (Thailand) Limited'.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-25D-361598' does not contain a separate LC field label or bank term. Verification proceeds with all checkpoints.

locations: Invoice page 1, EXPORTER / CONSIGNOR field: 'West Food i Göteborg AB'
Invoice page 1, header branding: 'West Food Trading worldwide'
Invoice page 1, Headquarters block: 'Ringögatan 33, SE-417 07 GOTHENBURG'

checkpoints.certificate_value: West Food i Göteborg AB, Ringögatan 33, 41707, Göteborg, SWEDEN
checkpoints.invoice_value: West Food i Göteborg AB, Ringögatan 33, 417 07 Gothenburg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Check if consignor name appears anywhere in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 'West Food i Göteborg AB' found directly in EXPORTER / CONSIGNOR field on invoice page 1.

comparison_steps.description: Compare company name from certificate to invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Exact name match: 'West Food i Göteborg AB' in both documents.
MATCH – Certificate: 'SWEDEN', Invoice: 'Sweden'. Identical after normalization.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found directly in invoice EXPORTER/CONSIGNOR field.
Name and country verification for consignor.
Country verification – Sweden matches Sweden after normalization.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'West Food i Göteborg AB' at Ringögatan 33, 41707 Göteborg, SWEDEN. Invoice exporter: 'West Food i Göteborg AB' at Ringögatan 33, 417 07 Gothenburg, Sweden. Company name is identical. Country is Sweden in both documents (case normalization applied). Address differs only in postal code formatting (41707 vs 417 07) and city name spelling (Göteborg vs Gothenburg) which are minor formatting differences not affecting identity. MATCH per 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.
checkpoints.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'West Food i Göteborg AB' är identiskt i certifikatet och fakturan. Land SWEDEN/Sweden överensstämmer efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Direkt matchning i EXPORTER/CONSIGNOR-fältet.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Ikano (Thailand) Limited, 38 Moo 6 Bangna-Trad Rd. (Km8), Bangkaew Sub-District, Bangplee District, Samutprakarn 10540, Thailand
checkpoints.invoice_value: Ikano (Thailand) Limited, 38 Moo 6 Bangna-Trad Rd. (Km8), Bangkaew Sub-District, Bangplee District, Samutprakarn 10540, Thailand

comparison_steps.result: Invoice CONSIGNEE field found with 'Ikano (Thailand) Limited'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare consignee name from certificate to invoice CONSIGNEE field.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Exact name match: 'Ikano (Thailand) Limited' in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Invoice has explicit CONSIGNEE field – used as primary identification field.
Name verification – exact match after normalization.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Ikano (Thailand) Limited' at 38 Moo 6 Bangna-Trad Rd. (Km8), Bangkaew Sub-District, Bangplee District, Samutprakarn 10540, Thailand. Invoice CONSIGNEE: 'Ikano (Thailand) Limited' at identical address with 'Thailand' appended. Company name is an exact match. Country is Thailand in both. Address details are identical. MATCH per 4.2.0.2, 4.2.2, and 4.2.3.
checkpoints.motivation: Mottagarens namn 'Ikano (Thailand) Limited' är identiskt i certifikatet och fakturans CONSIGNEE-fält. Adress och land 'Thailand' överensstämmer exakt.

checkpoints.certificate_value:
1 177 ct
As per attached commercial invoice 110423, 110424, 110425
Dated 2025-09-24
Food products:
Baking Glue, Chocolates, Chips and Snacks
checkpoints.invoice_value: Salt & Vinegar 175g; Ranch & Sourcream 175g; Linschips Sourcream & Onion 90g; Linschips Ranch & Sourcream 90g; Ostbagar Extra Stora Chedder 210g; Dumle Snacks Original 100g; Dumle Original 120g; Geisha (Milk chocolate with soft hazelnut) 37g; Baking Glue 100g | Invoice Nos: 110423, 110424, 110425 | Date: 2025-09-24

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers.
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers are specified in the certificate. Proceed to Priority 2/3.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate uses general description with explicit invoice reference. Check if invoice reference, date, and expression match.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Certificate states 'As per attached commercial invoice 110423, 110424, 110425 Dated 2025-09-24'. Invoice numbers 110423, 110424, 110425 match. Invoice date 2025-09-24 matches. Expression 'As per attached commercial invoice' constitutes an explicit invoice reference.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that invoice content is consistent with certificate's general description 'Food products: Baking Glue, Chocolates, Chips and Snacks'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Invoice contains: Baking Glue (exact match), Chocolates (Dumle Snacks Original, Dumle Original, Geisha – all chocolate products per commodity codes 1806 xxxx), Chips and Snacks (Salt & Vinegar, Ranch & Sourcream, Linschips varieties, Ostbagar – all snack products per commodity codes 2005/1904). The invoice content is fully consistent with the certificate's general description.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains multiple origin countries. Check if origin-per-article is clear.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate contains explicit reference to attached invoice ('As per attached commercial invoice...'). Invoice page 2 contains 'Country of origin' column per article row. This constitutes a valid coupling via invoice reference per 4.3.7.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certificate contains 'As per attached commercial invoice' with invoice numbers and date that match the invoice.
Koppling vara-ursprungsland – certificate refers to attached invoice which contains per-article origin.

evidence.raw_text:
1 177 ct
As per attached commercial invoice 110423, 110424, 110425
Dated 2025-09-24
Food products:
Baking Glue, Chocolates, Chips and Snacks

Salt & Vinegar 175g; Ranch & Sourcream 175g; Linschips Sourcream & Onion 90g; Linschips Ranch & Sourcream 90g; Ostbagar Extra Stora Chedder 210g; Dumle Snacks Original 100g; Dumle Original 120g; Geisha (Milk chocolate with soft hazelnut) 37g; Baking Glue 100g
SE, SE, SE, SE, SE, FI, FI, FI, PL

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate uses a general goods description ('Food products: Baking Glue, Chocolates, Chips and Snacks') with an explicit reference to attached commercial invoices 110423, 110424, 110425 dated 2025-09-24. This triggers Priority 3 (rule 4.3.5). Invoice numbers match exactly: 110423, 110424, 110425. Invoice date matches: 2025-09-24. The expression 'As per attached commercial invoice' is an explicit invoice reference. Content consistency: The invoice contains Baking Glue (exact match to certificate), chocolate products (Dumle Snacks, Dumle Original, Geisha – matching 'Chocolates'), and chips/snack products (Salt & Vinegar, Ranch & Sourcream, Linschips, Ostbagar – matching 'Chips and Snacks'). The invoice content is fully consistent with the certificate's general description. Per 4.3.7, the coupling of goods to origin countries is satisfied via the invoice reference, as the invoice page 2 contains a dedicated 'Country of origin' column per article. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatet använder generell varubeskrivning ('Food products: Baking Glue, Chocolates, Chips and Snacks') med uttrycklig hänvisning till bifogade fakturor 110423, 110424, 110425 daterade 2025-09-24. Fakturanummer och datum överensstämmer exakt. Fakturans varuinnehåll är förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning. Regel 4.3.5 (generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens) uppfylld.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Attempt Priority 2 textmatchning of individual product names
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Not needed – Priority 3 (generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens) applies since the certificate explicitly refers to the attached invoices with matching numbers and date. Priority 3 is sufficient.

checkpoints.invoice_value: GROSS WEIGHT in kg: 2 620,644 / NET WEIGHT in kg: 2 194,645

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains two weight values: '2 620,644 kg Gross' and '2 194,645 kg Net'. Both are explicit with unit (kg) and weight category (Gross/Net). These are the verification-basis quantities.
comparison_steps.result: Verification-basis: 2620.644 kg Gross and 2194.645 kg Net.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 2620.644 kg Gross can be identified in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Invoice page 1 states 'GROSS WEIGHT in kg: 2 620,644'. After thousands-separator normalization (space as separator) and comma-as-decimal interpretation, this equals 2620.644 kg. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 2194.645 kg Net can be identified in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Invoice page 1 states 'NET WEIGHT in kg: 2 194,645'. After normalization, this equals 2194.645 kg. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 contains the verification-basis quantities. Both GW and NW from box 7 used.
Förekomstkontroll – both GW and NW values from certificate found exactly in invoice.
Tusentalsavskiljare – space used as thousands separator in invoice values (e.g., '2 620,644' → 2620.644).
Weight category (GW/NW) explicitly stated in both certificate and invoice.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 contains two weight values: '2 620,644 kg Gross' and '2 194,645 kg Net'. Both have explicit unit (kg) and weight category (Gross/Net). Invoice page 1 contains: 'GROSS WEIGHT in kg: 2 620,644' and 'NET WEIGHT in kg: 2 194,645'. After normalizing the space as thousands separator per 4.4.3.3 (the values are not integers but this is a formatting convention where space separates thousands and comma is decimal), the values are: Certificate GW = 2620.644 kg, Invoice GW = 2620.644 kg → exact match. Certificate NW = 2194.645 kg, Invoice NW = 2194.645 kg → exact match. Both quantities verified. MATCH per 4.4.1.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt 2 620,644 kg och nettovikt 2 194,645 kg kan identifieras exakt i fakturan under respektive fält 'GROSS WEIGHT in kg' och 'NET WEIGHT in kg'. Viktkategori och enhet överensstämmer.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Country of origin per item: SE (Salt & Vinegar, Ranch & Sourcream, Linschips Sourcream & Onion, Linschips Ranch & Sourcream, Ostbagar Extra Stora Chedder), FI (Dumle Snacks Original, Dumle Original, Geisha), PL (Baking Glue)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice page 2 has a dedicated 'Country of origin' column per article row.
comparison_steps.result: Found: SE (5 articles), FI (3 articles), PL (1 article).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'European Community - SE, PL, FI'. Normalize country codes: SE = Sweden, PL = Poland, FI = Finland. All are EU member states.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate lists: European Community with SE, PL, FI. Invoice lists: SE, FI, PL. All three country codes from the certificate are found in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'European Community' which is equivalent to 'European Union'. SE (Sweden), PL (Poland), FI (Finland) are all EU-27 member states.
comparison_steps.result: All origin countries in the certificate are EU member states. All are found in the invoice's Country of origin column.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 – Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify that the invoice does not contain origin countries outside EU that are not listed in the certificate.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice origins: SE, SE, SE, SE, SE, FI, FI, FI, PL. All are EU member states. No non-EU origins found in invoice. No contradiction.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5 – Verify each certificate origin in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Certificate lists SE, PL, FI. Check each against invoice.
comparison_steps.result: SE: found in invoice (5 articles). PL: found in invoice (1 article – Baking Glue). FI: found in invoice (3 articles). All certificate origins verified.

rules_applied.description: Ursprungsland identified in invoice's dedicated 'Country of origin' column on page 2.
Country code normalization: SE=Sweden, PL=Poland, FI=Finland.
EU normalization – 'European Community' is equivalent to 'European Union'. SE, PL, FI are all EU-27 members.
Positive verification – each origin country in certificate (SE, PL, FI) explicitly found in invoice.

evidence.raw_text: SE, SE, SE, SE, SE, FI, FI, FI, PL

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate origin field: 'European Community - SE, PL, FI'. This lists European Community as the overarching origin designation with three specific EU member state codes: SE (Sweden), PL (Poland), FI (Finland). Invoice page 2 has a dedicated 'Country of origin' column with values: SE (5 items), FI (3 items), PL (1 item). Verification of each certificate origin: SE → found in invoice (5 articles with SE origin), PL → found in invoice (1 article: Baking Glue with PL origin), FI → found in invoice (3 articles: Dumle Snacks, Dumle Original, Geisha with FI origin). All certificate origins positively verified. No non-EU origins found in invoice. Per 4.5.4.1, European Community subsumes all EU member states, and all invoice origins (SE, FI, PL) are EU members. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'European Community - SE, PL, FI' kan verifieras mot fakturans 'Country of origin'-kolumn som anger SE, FI och PL för respektive artikelrad. Alla tre länder är EU-medlemsstater och kan uttryckligen identifieras i fakturan.

rule_evaluation_log.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
All three criteria met: invoice numbers match, consignor matches, consignee matches.
Consignor 'West Food i Göteborg AB' found directly in invoice EXPORTER/CONSIGNOR field.
SWEDEN ↔ Sweden – identical after case normalization.
Invoice has explicit CONSIGNEE field with 'Ikano (Thailand) Limited'.

Certificate references invoices 110423, 110424, 110425 dated 2025-09-24 with 'As per attached commercial invoice'. Invoice numbers and date match exactly. Invoice content consistent with certificate description.
Certificate references attached invoice. Invoice page 2 contains per-article 'Country of origin' column providing the coupling.
Both GW (2620.644 kg) and NW (2194.645 kg) from certificate found exactly in invoice.
Space used as thousands separator in invoice values (e.g., '2 620,644').
'European Community' with SE, PL, FI. All are EU member states. All found in invoice.
SE, PL, FI all explicitly found in invoice's Country of origin column.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändare (West Food i Göteborg AB, Sverige), mottagare (Ikano (Thailand) Limited, Thailand), varubeskrivning (livsmedelsprodukter enligt bifogade fakturor), kvantitet (bruttovikt 2 620,644 kg och nettovikt 2 194,645 kg) samt ursprungsland (EU – Sverige, Polen, Finland) kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Certificate references invoices 110423, 110424, 110425 dated 2025-09-24 which match the attached invoice exactly. All origin countries (SE, PL, FI) are confirmed in invoice's per-article Country of origin column. Weights match exactly. Document pair eligible for automatic approval.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Samtliga kontrollpunkter ger MATCH. Dokumentparet uppfyller kraven för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH → comparison_result IDENTICAL → workflow AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. Minimum confidence across checkpoints is 0.95 (goods description), above the 0.85 threshold for IDENTICAL.
